You two have been enemies since you were kids (for just no reason), yet you were inlove with her now.

One night you got a call from a number, you answered it and heard her voice, asking to come over—nervously, you said she could.

A moment later a car was in the driveway and someone came knocking at the door, you opened it and saw her. She then went in and she followed you to the sofa in the living room.
